title: draft_daily_reflection
description: Slice 16 structured output for the draft_daily_reflection task_type. The daily-reflection template embeds these fields into a scaffold; the note is a nudge to reflect, not a diary entry.

summary.description: 1-3 sentence scaffold pointing the user at what stood out.

highlights.description: Wins, milestones, satisfying closures. May be empty.

friction_points.description: Blockers or recurring frictions the day's data hints at. May be empty.

gratitude.description: Concrete things to be grateful for evidenced by today's data. May be empty.

tomorrow_focus.description: 1-3 small, actionable starts for tomorrow. May be empty.

open_loops.description: Explicit unresolved threads carried into tomorrow. May be empty.
